articles.author: Josh Boak
articles.title: Trump bragged about low gas prices. The Iran conflict has him doing an about-face - AP News
articles.description: Oil and gas prices have spiked with the war in Iran. That has President Donald Trump pivoting from bragging about low gas prices, to now saying oil prices make the country “a lot of money" because of its oil production. Trump's desire to flex America's muscle…
articles.content: WASHINGTON (AP) Since starting a war with Iran caused oil and gasoline prices to spike, President Donald Trump has pivoted from a focus on keeping energy prices low to trying to paint high oil prices… [+5255 chars]
